case_title: LARRY BUCK VS. MELISSA MULLINS ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BUCK, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT MULLINS, MELISSA WELSCH, GERRIANNE DEPA, RAY RIDGE REEF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELSCH, GERRIANNE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SC-105 REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE (SUBMITTED ON INCORRECT SC-105 FORM) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEPA, RAY
ORDER (SC-105) - REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE: THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RIDGE REEF
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT MULLINS, MELISSA RIDGE REEF

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS MELISSA MULLINS AND RIDGE REEF, REPESENTED BY KELLY FALLIS, PROPERTY MANAGER, APPEARED. DEFENDANTS GERIANNE WELSCH AND RAY DEPA APPEARED BY COURT CALL. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S HISTORY OF FILING CASES AND THEN NOT APPEARING FOR TRIAL, IT IS RECOMMENDED IF PLAINTIFF RE-FILES THIS CASE AND THEN DOES NOT APPEAR FOR TRIAL THAT THE CASE BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE" PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
